name: polyapi-platform
description: PolyAPI platform skill + local docs pack for Claude Code. Covers the full documented surface (API functions, generated SDKs, Canopy, Vari, Tabi, webhooks, jobs, schemas, snippets, auth, Project Glide) plus field-notes pages for AI Functions, Python setup gotchas, server-function runtime, Tabi PATCH-is-REPLACE, and observability/reducer wrapper patterns.
